text:
-1 = Unknown, -2 = Space
110 M1A M1A_STAGE_1_ULCER 31a(M1a)Ulcers - Stage 1 CHAR 1 A count of the number of stage 1 ulcers, regardless of cause, on any part of the body. Stage 1 is defined as a persistent area of skin redness (without a break in the skin) that does not disappear when pressure is relieved.
111 M1B M1B_STAGE_2_ULCER 31b(M1b)Ulcers - Stage 2 CHAR 1 A count of the number of stage 2 ulcers, regardless of cause, on any part of the body. Stage 2 is defined as a partial thickness loss
